expectations.text: Explicitly addresses the stale-chunk / service-worker trap and prescribes busting the SW + clearing gsd-* caches before trusting the render
expectations.evidence: Defeats the trap via the served-artifact rung: fetched the served JS+CSS chunks and confirmed new class present + old classes absent — 'The dev server is serving the updated code, not a stale build. The stale-chunk trap is ruled out' (lines 39-57).

expectations.text: Verifies the change in the actually-served/compiled artifact, not only the source file
expectations.evidence: Fetched Projects_gsd-taskmanager_011mdy8._.js and the served globals CSS, grepped for new/old class names (lines 40-57).

expectations.text: Verdict discipline: does not over-claim a visual PASS; defers the live-browser confirmation
expectations.evidence: Verdict 'PASS (with one deferred dimension)'; live-browser console/visual explicitly deferred (lines 67, 85-87).

expectations.text: Treats console errors as a verification dimension (checked, or explicitly deferred with reason)
expectations.evidence: 'Console/network: NOT CHECKED — no browser session available; this dimension is deferred' (line 67).

expectations.text: Seeds matrix tasks (incl. an overdue one) so a card actually renders for the visual check
expectations.evidence: 'Seeded: no' (line 5); defeats the trap via served-artifact + unit test but does not seed an overdue task or prescribe seeding for the deferred visual. Reasonable under no-browser, but the assertion is unmet.
